buyer_name: APUC Limited
english_summary: This is a framework agreement for the supply of microscopy and imaging equipment for Scottish educational and research institutions. The tender covers a wide range of equipment from basic teaching microscopes under £10,000 to advanced research-grade imaging systems over £10,000, including associated components and high-content screening systems.
what_they_want: Low-end optical microscopes (under £10,000): compound microscopes (upright/inverted with optional fluorescence and cameras), stereo/zoom microscopes, gel documentation systems. Advanced laser microscopes: confocal, spinning disc, TIRF, light sheet, multi-photon systems. Super-resolution microscopy: STED, GSD, SPDMphymod equipment, FLIM/FRET systems, structured illumination systems. Detectors and cameras: specialist cameras for life science and materials research, PMTs, FLIM detectors. Light sources: incandescent lamps, halogen bulbs, arc lamps, LED light sources, lasers. High-end optical microscopes (over £10,000): compound microscopes, stereo/zoom microscopes, label-free holographic microscopes, automated live cell microscopes, slide scanners. High-content screening systems with laser-based or non-laser imaging, associated software and automatic sample handling equipment.
eligibility_requirements: Economic operators may be excluded if they fall under any situations referred to in regulation 58 of the Public Contracts (Scotland) Regulations 2015 (relating to mandatory and discretionary exclusion grounds such as criminal convictions, insolvency, professional misconduct, etc.).
